description: Auto-trigger evals: verify that loci-post-edit fires automatically after Claude makes Edit/Write changes to C/C++/Rust source files, without the user explicitly asking for post-edit analysis.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running. These evals require compiled artifacts (.o / .out) to be present for full analysis; if artifacts are missing the skill must still trigger and note '(no binary)'.

evals.prompt: Add a null-pointer guard at the top of GATTServApp_ReadAttr in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gattservapp_util.c that returns ATT_ERR_ATTR_NOT_FOUND immediately if the pAttr pointer is NULL. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Edits gattservapp_util.c to add the null guard, then automatically invokes loci-post-edit without being asked. A Post-Edit report for GATTServApp_ReadAttr appears after the edit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: After editing a .c file, loci-post-edit must be auto-invoked — user did not ask for it explicitly

assertions.text: Response contains an Edit or code change to gattservapp_util.c
assertions.description: The code change must actually be made before the post-edit report is emitted

evals.prompt: In Connection_getConnhandle in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c, change the out-of-bounds return value from 0 to 0xFFFF so callers can distinguish a valid handle from an error. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Edits app_connection.c to change the sentinel return value, then automatically invokes loci-post-edit. A Post-Edit report for Connection_getConnhandle appears after the edit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: After editing a .c file, loci-post-edit must fire automatically

assertions.text: Response contains an Edit or code change to app_connection.c
assertions.description: The code change must be made before the post-edit report appears

evals.prompt: In $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.h, add a #define CONN_INVALID_HANDLE 0xFFFF constant so the header exports the sentinel value used by Connection_getConnhandle. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Edits app_connection.h to add the define, then automatically invokes loci-post-edit. A Post-Edit report appears after the edit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: After editing a .h header file, loci-post-edit must fire automatically

assertions.text: Response contains an Edit or code change to app_connection.h
assertions.description: The header change must be made before the post-edit report appears

evals.prompt: Optimise ClockP_walkQueueDynamic in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockPLPF3_freertos.c by caching the current tick count in a local variable before the loop so it is not re-read on every iteration. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Edits ClockPLPF3_freertos.c to cache the tick count, then automatically invokes loci-post-edit. A Post-Edit report for ClockP_walkQueueDynamic appears after the edit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: After editing a .c file during an optimisation task, loci-post-edit must auto-fire

assertions.text: Response contains an Edit or code change to ClockPLPF3_freertos.c
assertions.description: The optimisation edit must be made before the post-edit report appears

evals.prompt: In GAPBondMgr_FindAddr in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c, the loop condition checks MAP_osal_memcmp(bonds[idx].addr, pDevAddr, B_ADDR_LEN) before (addrType == bonds[idx].addrType). Swap them so the cheap integer addrType comparison runs first and short-circuits the expensive 6-byte memcmp when types do not match. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Edits gapbondmgr.c to reorder the two conditions in GAPBondMgr_FindAddr, then automatically invokes loci-post-edit. The Post-Edit report for GAPBondMgr_FindAddr shows a non-zero timing or energy diff compared to the pre-edit baseline.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: After editing a .c file, loci-post-edit must auto-fire

assertions.text: Response contains an Edit or code change to gapbondmgr.c
assertions.description: The condition-reorder edit must be applied before the post-edit report appears

assertions.text: Post-Edit report includes a numeric timing or energy diff value that is not 0% or 0.0
assertions.description: Swapping the memcmp and addrType checks is a real code-gen change and must produce a measurable non-zero diff

evals.prompt: Update the run_evals.sh script in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to add a --verbose flag that prints each eval ID before running it.
evals.expected_output: Edits run_evals.sh (a shell script) without triggering loci-post-edit. No Post-Edit report appears because the edited file is not a C/C++/Rust source file.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Post-Edit:' header
assertions.description: Editing a .sh shell script must not trigger loci-post-edit — only C/C++/Rust file edits auto-invoke the skill
